subgoals.description: Research and gather detailed information about a specific Edinburgh venue including name, location, capacity, amenities, and pricing.
subgoals.success_criterion: Comprehensive venue details are collected and verified.

subgoals.description: Draft the flyer content using the gathered venue details to create an engaging and informative promotional text.
subgoals.success_criterion: Flyer text is complete, well-structured, and includes all necessary information.
